assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly addresses Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility in the 'Pre-Upgrade: Istio Version Compatibility' section with specific version mappings (e.g., 'Istio 1.20+ supports K8s 1.29-1.32')

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Critical first step: Verify your Istio version supports Kubernetes 1.32' and references checking the 'Istio support matrix' with specific commands

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'If your Istio version doesn't support K8s 1.32: 1. Upgrade Istio FIRST (before GKE upgrade)' with step-by-step instructions

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response explains in detail: 'When nodes drain during upgrade, pods with sidecars get rescheduled. The injection webhook must be healthy or pod creation fails' and includes webhook health checks

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response addresses this in the sidecar injection section with testing commands and mentions verifying injection works before node upgrades, though it could be more explicit about version matching

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes proxy status monitoring with 'istioctl proxy-status' command and mentions checking 'proxy connectivity' during and after upgrade

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response provides specific commands: 'kubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app=istiod' for version checking and 'istioctl proxy-status' for sync status, plus 'istioctl proxy-config cluster' command

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response addresses version mismatch concerns in the mTLS connectivity section and includes monitoring for certificate/mTLS issues during upgrades, though it could be more explicit about the specific risks of version mismatches
